message:
bd-2q3f.2: fix non-positive scale factor and improve SVG transform parity

- Add assertion to Rotor::scale() to prevent NaN/Inf from ln(0) or ln(negative)
- Add render_transform_to_svg_matrix() for bit-identical SVG output
- Update scene_transform_value() to use direct matrix formatting
- Add tests for scale edge cases (zero, negative)

This ensures defensive validation on the CGA rotor scale transform
and maintains exact output parity with the existing TransformBuilder.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
